globs:

# Python Testing Standards

## Framework
- pytest for unit and integration tests
- coverage.py for coverage (threshold >= 80%)
- pytest-cov for integrated coverage reporting

## Test Structure
- Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
- Use `pytest.fixture` for setup and teardown
- Group related tests in classes prefixed with `Test`
- Use `pytest.mark.parametrize` for parameterized tests

## Naming
- Test files: `test_<module>.py`
- Test functions: `test_<description>()`
- Be descriptive: `test_create_order_with_empty_cart_raises_error`

## Mocking
- Use `unittest.mock.patch` or `pytest-mock`
- Prefer dependency injection over monkey-patching
- Use `tmp_path` fixture for file system tests

## Coverage Discipline
- Test all happy paths and failure paths
- Validate with mutmut (mutation testing)
